title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Agreement by which the extension of the days that will be considered unworkable by the General Coordination of the Mexican Commission for Refugee Assistance of the Ministry of the Interior is made public.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Official letter 500-05-2024-6576 through which a list of taxpayers is communicated who rebutted the presumption of non-existence of operations provided for in the first paragraph of article 69-B of the Federal Tax Code in force until July 24, 2018.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Official letter 500-05-2024-6577 through which a list of taxpayers who rebutted the presumption of non-existence of operations provided for in the first paragraph of article 69-B of the Federal Tax Code is communicated.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Official letter 500-05-2024-6579 through which a list of taxpayers who promoted some means of defense against the presumption referred to in article 69-B first paragraph of the Tax Code of the Federation or against theolution referred to in the fourth paragraph of the article in question and once it was resolved, the judicial or administrative body annulled the aforementioned act.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Official letter 500-05-2024-6580 through which a list of taxpayers who promoted some means of defense against the presumption referred to in article 69-B first paragraph of the Tax Code of the Federation in force until 24july 2018 or against the resolution referred to in the third paragraph of the article in question and once it was resolved, the judicial or administrative body left the aforementioned act unsubsistent.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Official letter 500-05-2024-6581 through which a global list of presumption of taxpayers who were located in the case provided for in article 69-B, first paragraph of the Tax Code of the Federation is communicated.
